title: Hands-on Session on Building a 4-Wheeled Robot
description: IEEE RAS organized a hands-on session on building a 4-wheeled robot on 14 February 2026 to introduce participants to Arduino programming, Bluetooth communication using the HC-05 module, and robotic bot construction. The workshop provided practical experience in microcontroller-based systems, wireless control, and real-time hardware integration. With guided support from instructors, participants developed functional robotic bots while enhancing their problem-solving skills, teamwork, and understanding of embedded systems and robotics applications.
